Version
  • Reference
  • Utilities
  • Utilities

Utilities

TinOpener.logistic — Function
logistic(x::Float64)

Return the logistic transformation of x, $f(x) = \frac{1}{1 + \exp (-x)}$

TinOpener.logit — Function
logit(x::Float64)

Return the logit transform of x, $f(x) = \log\left(\frac{x}{1 - x}\right)$

TinOpener.aic — Function
aic(k::Int, logL:Float64)

Akaike information criterion for model with log-likelihood logL and number of model parameters k, i.e. $\textnormal{AIC} = 2k - \log L$ where $L$ is the likelihood.

« State space modelsIndex »
